analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet advocates peaceful coexistence and mutually beneficial cooperation between China and the US despite different systems and cultures. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not promoted; no criticism of the West or US. CH2 (China as benevolent power): Partially aligns, as it promotes cooperation and mutual benefit, positioning China (along with the US) as seeking peaceful coexistence; this matches China's cooperative/peaceful-development framing. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values): While it mentions different systems, it does not praise China's domestic system or values; no. CH5 (CCP succeeds): No claim about governance outcomes. CH6 (culture/nature): Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH2 applies.
